summary: Kang Hyunwoo engages in a practice duel with Cancun using wooden swords to ensure safety and fairness. During the match, Hyunwoo realizes Cancun possesses a potent debuff skill, prompting him to activate his own unique skill, 'Domain Declaration.' Hyunwoo ultimately emerges victorious, and in recognition of his skill, he begins training under Cancun to learn the advanced technique of 'Fighting Spirit' emission.
key_moments: Hyunwoo and Cancun agree to a duel using wooden swords to avoid serious injury.
Hyunwoo counters Cancun's 'Sluggish' debuff aura by activating his unique 'Domain Declaration' skill.
Hyunwoo defeats Cancun and receives an offer to be trained in the 'Fighting Spirit' emission technique.
